title: How Anthropic uses Claude in GTM Engineering
summary: Anthropic's GTM team built CLAFTS (Claude Drafts), an AI email assistant powered by the Claude API that generates customer replies matching the user's voice. Jared Sires, a GTM Product Manager without coding experience, used Claude Code to reduce administrative burden on sales staff.
